recommendations.title: Moana 2
recommendations.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.
recommendations.director: Dana Ledoux Miller, David G. Derrick Jr., Jason Hand

recommendations.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
recommendations.overview: In their quest to confront the ultimate evil, Percy and his friends battle swarms of mythical creatures to find the mythical Golden Fleece and to stop an ancient evil from rising.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Great Adventure in the Antarctic Kachi Kochi
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Doraemon and Nobita discover a mysterious golden ring far beneath the ice in Antarctica, leading them to uncover an ancient, ruined city.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.
